title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.010 - County planning commission authorized (first class charter counties)
text:
64.010.  County planning commission authorized (first class charter counties). — In all counties of the first class, except counties of the first class not having a charter form of government, the county commission is authorized and empowered to provide for the preparation, adoption, amendment, extension or carrying out of a county plan and to create by order a county planning commission with the powers and duties as set forth in sections 64.010 to 64.160.
(L. 1945 p. 1327 § 1a, A.L. 1974 H.B. 1446)
